antiZionistNotes: No RPCNA pastors found in Knox Seminary Open Letter signatory lists. No RPCNA pastors found with public anti-Zionist statements. The RPCNA has no public denominational position on Zionism/Israel. As a Westminster Standards denomination, the default theology is covenantal/amillennial (non-Zionist), but no active anti-Zionist voices were identified.
lgbtqStatus: Conservative stance. The RPCNA published 'The Gospel and Sexual Orientation' (2010 Synod study) affirming traditional biblical sexual ethics. No LGBTQ-affirming churches found.

womenLeadership.pastorsAndElders: The RPCNA does NOT ordain women as pastors or elders. The 1888 Synod explicitly stated this would never come up for consideration.
womenLeadership.deacons: IMPORTANT: The RPCNA has permitted women deacons since 1888 (Synod vote 93-24). About 17-18% of congregations (17 of 91) have ordained female deacons. Synod reaffirmed this position in 2002. About 36% of members take exception to this practice.
womenLeadership.implication: Similar to ARP — women deacons are allowed denomination-wide but not universal.
